tools.name: health
tools.description: Health check. Returns server status and optional echo.

tools.name: web_search_simple
tools.description: Simple factual web search via Brave (lookups, definitions, short queries). Fixed $0.003/call.

tools.name: web_search_medium
tools.description: Default web search via Brave for ambiguous or general queries. Fixed $0.008/call.

tools.name: web_search_deep
tools.description: Deep research search via Exa (academic, boolean, multi-source synthesis). Fixed $0.015/call.

tools.name: web_search_cached
tools.description: Cache-only lookup; returns SEARCH_CACHE_MISS error if not in cache. Fixed $0.002/call.
